name: Chouchou Akimichi
description: Chouchou Akimichi is a kunoichi and a member of Konohagakure's Akimichi clan. Together with her teammates [Inojin Yamanaka](https://anilist.co/character/121441/Inojin-Yamanaka) and [Shikadai Nara,](https://anilist.co/character/121442/Shikadai-Nara) she forms the seventeenth generation of the Ino–Shika–Chō trio. name: Gin
description: An alcoholic that once made money by racing bicycles. When his daughter became ill, he threw a race to get the money for her medicine, but because of that got banned from the sport. ~!... or so he says , in reality he owned a bike shop with his wife , he ran up a gambling debt and ran away from home leaving his wife with the shop and the baby who became a nurse!~ After that he started living on the streets with Hana and Miyuki.

name: Haruka Nogizaka
description: __Height:__ 155 cm (5'0") Haruka is the female main character, and is Yuuto's classmate. She is idolized at school due to her beauty and intelligence, and is regarded as the school's most unattainable girl. In fact, at school she is known by the French nicknames "Nuit Étoilée" (The Silver Star of the Night) and "Lumière du Clavier" (The Shining Princess on the Piano). She is very skilled at playing the piano and has taken overall victories in international contests. She also has a gentle persona

name: Headon
description: Headon is the Guardian of the First Floor and is the caretaker of the Tower. He has an appearance reminiscent of a white rabbit because of his long ears. Headon talks in a friendly tone, but has been shown to have a cruel and manipulative streak. He presents his ideas and opinions in a logical and pragmatic manner, but his goals and desires themselves are not understood. He is perfectly willing to manipulate dozens of lives and create the nucleus of civil unrest to attain his mysterious goal. Al

name: Howan
description: __Height:__ 152 cm __Group:__ Mashumairesh!! __Position:__ Vocals and Guitar A girl of the pale fox tribe, born and raised in a small village in the northern lands. She dreams of one day heading to the big city in hopes that something wonderful awaits her there. Highly curious and always giving her absolute all, she struggles with numbers but excels at housework. She is good-natured, yet she isn't afraid to firmly say "no" to things she dislikes. name: Inaho  Yamato
description: Inaho is a part of the Election Committee, serving as a referee during election gambling matches.

name: Ira Blood

name: Izana Shinatose
description: Shinatose is a Guardian pilot and quickly becomes Nagate's best friend, constantly following Nagate and teaching him about the life inside Sidonia. Izana is a new third gender that originated during the hundred of years of human emigration into space.

name: Jaken
description: A yōkai who is Sesshōmaru's servant: not especially powerful but extremely loyal, he is usually a comical character. Sesshōmaru typically responds to Jaken's failures or more annoying behavior with a sound beating, but Jaken believes this is Sesshomaru's right and never wavers in his loyalty. name: Ji-Hyeok Woo
description: Cameraman and classmate of Hobin Yoo. He used to be Pakgo's cameraman before the fight during his gaming stream was released to the public.

name: Jirou
description: On the first few parts, Jirou was known as a cruel leader. He was merciless and banished many other tengu when they showed any sign of weakness. An example was how he had treated Kurama when he had been younger.

name: Jun Matsunaga
description: __Height__: 180cm (5'10.9") Matsunaga is a designer who is a resident of a boarding house that is owned by Miko's uncle. Matsunaga appears to have anger management issues as he takes out his anger toward other people and objects a lot. Despite his hotheadedness,​ he is shown to be tender and caring toward the people he cares about, especially toward Miko.

name: Kazuki Fuse
description: After witnessing the suicide bombing of a terrorist girl, Constable Kazuki Fuse becomes haunted by her image, and is forced to undergo retraining for his position in the Capital Police's Special Unit. However, unknown to him, he becomes a key player in a dispute between Capital and Local Police forces, as he finds himself increasingly involved with the sister of the very girl he saw die. (Source: Anime News Network)

name: Keiki Kiryuu
description: Keiki is a kind-hearted, friendly and considerate guy. He cares for his close friends and family, and is, in turn, cared for and liked just as much by them. His kindness is pointed out, by [Shouma](https://anilist.co/character/138711/Shoma-Akiyama), as his good trait and as to why girls would have a reason to like or love him. name: Koji Kashin
description: Koji Kashin is an "Inner" from the organization Kara that's in charge of the sector on the outskirts of the Land of Fire. ~!Koji Kashin is a clone of Jiraiya that was created by Amado Sanzu for the purpose of killing Isshiki Outsutsuki.!~

name: Kouji Haruta
description: Kōji is a male student in Ryūji's class who has long hair and is on good terms with him. He is regarded as a class 'idiot' and that opinion is deepened by his poor school marks and overly energetic behavior. His childish pranks often target Taiga and he has been the victim of her violent outbursts.

name: Kudou Kishi
description: Drive Knight (駆動騎士, Kudō Kishi) is the S-Class Rank 9 professional hero for the Hero Association.Drive Knight has long black hair and wears a white mask. His mask has a single horizontal slit for the eyes, and a single red shining eye in the center of the slit. The mask has three small vertical slits where his mouth should be. His armor is rather simplistic, being similar to a medieval black knights' armor.

name: Kyouka  Shiraishi
description: Shiraishi Kyouka is the main character of the hentai Energy Kyouka!!. She is a student in high-school and a prostitute. She is nymphomaniac and bisexual.

name: Kyouya Nagi
description: Itsuomi's cousin. He is a barista in a small bar.

name: Liz
description: Liz, or Elizabeth, was a knight from an enemy kingdom of Danafor, which attempted night ambush at Danafor, but got captured and sentenced to death. She was saved by Meliodas, the leader of the Holy Knights of Danafor and ended up living in Danafor and eventually also became Meliodas' lover. She is believed to have been killed during Danafor's complete annihilation.
